productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Sukoi White Sports Shoes
description: Created by adidas to give you support and enhance your performance, this is an extremely comfortable Sports shoe which you can rely on to take care of your feet. The simple, classic design will easily coordinate with your sports or gym apparel - wear this to look and feel great!UpperMesh upper with contrast 3-Stripe synthetic overlays and reflective highlightsCentral lace-up system for a snug FitSlightly raised heel tab at back heel which protects the Achilles tendon and locks the shoe in placeSoft, cushioned mesh collar and tongueMidsoleCHunky, injected EVA midsole for long-term, lightweight cushioningOutsoleAbrasion resistant grooves and lugs give excellent gripShoe careUse a moist cloth to remove dust and dirtDon't expose the shoe to direct sunlight or heatDon't use detergents or solvents
